mapper.sql: id, merchant_id AS "merchantId", chain_id AS "chainId", address, custody_ref AS "custodyRef", label, purpose, status, created_at AS "createdAt"
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wallet_address (id, merchant_id, chain_id, address, custody_ref, label, purpose, status, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{merchantId}, #{chainId}, #{address}, #{custodyRef}, #{label}, #{purpose}, #{status}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM wallet_address WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND id = #{id}
SELECT FROM wallet_address WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND chain_id = #{chainId} AND purpose = #{purpose} AND status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM wallet_address WHERE chain_id = #{chainId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT last_block FROM chain_cursor WHERE chain_id = #{chainId}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO chain_cursor (chain_id, last_block, updated_at) VALUES (#{chainId}, #{block}, now()) ON CONFLICT (chain_id) DO UPDATE SET last_block = EXCLUDED.last_block, updated_at = now()
mapper.sql: id, merchant_id AS "merchantId", chain_id AS "chainId", asset_code AS "assetCode", wallet_address_id AS "walletAddressId", from_address AS "fromAddress", to_address AS "toAddress", tx_hash AS "txHash", log_index AS "logIndex", block_number AS "blockNumber", amount, confirmations, status, ledger_tx_id AS "ledgerTxId", detected_at AS "detectedAt", credited_at AS "creditedAt", raw_payload::text AS "rawPayload"
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO deposit ( id, merchant_id, chain_id, asset_code, wallet_address_id, from_address, to_address, tx_hash, log_index, block_number, amount, confirmations, status, ledger_tx_id, detected_at, credited_at, raw_payload ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{merchantId}, #{chainId}, #{assetCode}, #{walletAddressId}, #{fromAddress}, #{toAddress}, #{txHash}, #{logIndex}, #{blockNumber}, #{amount}, #{confirmations}, #{status}, #{ledgerTxId}, #{detectedAt}, #{creditedAt}, COALESCE(#{rawPayload}::jsonb, NULL) ) ON CONFLICT (chain_id, tx_hash, log_index) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT FROM deposit WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND id = #{id}
mapper.sql: id, merchant_id AS "merchantId", chain_id AS "chainId", asset_code AS "assetCode", to_address AS "toAddress", amount, fee_amount AS "feeAmount", status, custody_ref AS "custodyRef", tx_hash AS "txHash", block_number AS "blockNumber", confirmations, risk_score AS "riskScore", risk_note AS "riskNote", requested_by AS "requestedBy", approved_by AS "approvedBy", requested_at AS "requestedAt", submitted_at AS "submittedAt", completed_at AS "completedAt", ledger_tx_reserve_id AS "ledgerTxReserveId", ledger_tx_settle_id AS "ledgerTxSettleId", failure_code AS "failureCode", failure_message AS "failureMessage", version
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO withdrawal ( id, merchant_id, chain_id, asset_code, to_address, amount, fee_amount, status, custody_ref, tx_hash, block_number, confirmations, risk_score, risk_note, requested_by, approved_by, requested_at, submitted_at, completed_at, ledger_tx_reserve_id, ledger_tx_settle_id, failure_code, failure_message, version ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{merchantId}, #{chainId}, #{assetCode}, #{toAddress}, #{amount}, COALESCE(#{feeAmount}, 0), #{status}, #{custodyRef}, #{txHash}, #{blockNumber}, COALESCE(#{confirmations}, 0), #{riskScore}, #{riskNote}, #{requestedBy}, #{approvedBy}, #{requestedAt}, #{submittedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{ledgerTxReserveId}, #{ledgerTxSettleId}, #{failureCode}, #{failureMessage}, COALESCE(#{version}, 0) )
mapper.update: UPDATE withdrawal SET status = #{row.status}, custody_ref = #{row.custodyRef}, tx_hash = #{row.txHash}, block_number = #{row.blockNumber}, confirmations = #{row.confirmations}, risk_score = #{row.riskScore}, risk_note = #{row.riskNote}, approved_by = #{row.approvedBy}, submitted_at = #{row.submittedAt}, completed_at = #{row.completedAt}, ledger_tx_reserve_id = #{row.ledgerTxReserveId}, ledger_tx_settle_id = #{row.ledgerTxSettleId}, failure_code = #{row.failureCode}, failure_message = #{row.failureMessage}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{row.id} AND version = #{expectedVersion}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM withdrawal WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND id = #{id}
